'''Cairnmogs''' were large spiked [[Lizard/Legends|lizards]] indigenous to [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. No longer able to survive in the wild, they were confined to the rocky hills in the [[Hanna City/Legends|Hanna]] [[Hanna Wild Game Reserve|Wild Game Reserve]]. They had hooves on their [[Limb/Legends|feet]] and [[Bone/Legends|bony]] protruding spikes, which they rattled and shook in displays of dominance. A cairnmog hibernated in [[Winter/Legends|winter]], [[Reproduction/Legends|mated]] in the spring, and laid [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] in the fall. [[Gender/Legends|Female]] cairnmogs abandoned their clutch of eggs in the winter, leaving their young to incubate while they attempted to survive the cold temperatures. Cairnmog hunting on Chandrila was allowed, but carefully regulated.
